rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.0081 governs student expulsion and alternative placement. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no operational overlap.
quote: Sec. 37.0081. EXPULSION AND PLACEMENT OF CERTAIN STUDENTS IN ALTERNATIVE SETTINGS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to student discipline, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
